title: buteogallus_lacernulatus assembly and decontamination steps
author: Pirro, S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Note: the specimen was originally misidentified as chelictinia_riocourii and the genome submitted to Genbank as chelictinia_riocourii. 

 The error was found afterwards and corrected. The genome was re-submitted as a new record. 

 The chelictinia_riocourii genome will be submitted as version 2 when a specimen can be obtained.
